title: Thankfulness.
content:
I thank Thee, Lord,
                 For every joyous hour
                 That has been mine!
        For every strengthening and helpful word,
        For every tender sound that I have heard,
                 I thank Thee, Lord!

                 I thank Thee, Lord,
                 For work and weariness
                 That have been mine!
        For patience toward one groping toward the light,
        For mid-day burden and for rest of night,
                 I thank Thee, Lord.
meaning:
Jean Blewett's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Thankfulness."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
